_doc: AZ-code → app obshtina-code map for entries that don't match by direct passthrough. The synthetic SOF00 is the Sofia-city aggregate; the hook in src/data/indicators/useIndicators.tsx falls back to it when a Sofia district (S2301..S2524) has no per-district value.

name_aliases._doc: Pre-2024 annual reviews don't include AZ codes; rows must be matched by Bulgarian municipality name within the surrounding Област context. Format: 'Област-name||Община-name' → obshtina code. Populated lazily as the normalize step encounters unmatched names — keep the file sorted to keep diffs reviewable.
